ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Country of nationality */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the athlete's profile image */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the athlete */,
  "current_rank" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the athlete */,
  "previous_year_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the athlete in the previous year */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the athlete competes in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "earnings" (
  "earnings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earnings record */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete related to these earnings */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the earnings report */,
  "earnings_million" REAL /* Earnings in millions of dollars */,
  "source_of_earnings" TEXT /* Source of the earnings (e.g., salary, endorsements, prize money) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the earnings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("earnings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_earnings_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the sport (e.g., Team, Individual) */,
  "governing_body" TEXT /* Governing body for the sport */,
  "popular_regions" TEXT /* Regions where the sport is popular */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ranking_history" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking record */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete related to this ranking */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the ranking */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking position of the athlete in that year */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points associated with the ranking */,
  "tournaments_played" INTEGER /* Number of tournaments played in the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ranking_history_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, agent, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorships" (
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete sponsored */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsoring company */,
  "contract_value" REAL /* Value of the sponsorship contract in millions */,
  "contract_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the contract in years */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship */,
  "contract_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the sponsorship contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event is held */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the event is associated with */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "tv_audience" INTEGER /* Number of TV viewers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_coverage" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media coverage record */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete covered in the media */,
  "media_source" TEXT /* Name of the media source */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of coverage (e.g., article, interview) */,
  "coverage_date" TEXT /* Date of the coverage */,
  "article_url" TEXT /* URL of the media article or interview */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views or reads */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Score representing the level of engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_coverage_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)
